body:
Modifies FluxCalculator so that `roughness_model` can be passed and conditionally
assigned based on the surface type. 

Low-res build test: https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-coarse-nightly-amip/builds/776

Closes #1687
title: COARE3 Roughness parameters over oceans

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Now that all component models strictly extend the interface defined by ClimaCoupler.jl, we can start moving them into extensions. First I'm moving the 3 simple, coupler-defined models into src. The set of packages they bring in is fairly random so we decided to do this over putting them in an extension.

Part of #1682

## Content
- [x] move prescribed ocean, slab ocean, prescribed sea ice to new src/Models/
- [x] moved tests from experiments/ClimaEarth/test/ to test/models/ and added them to test/runtests.jl
- [x] added documentation page docs/src/models.md
- [x] moved historical_sst_sic artifact to top-level ClimaCoupler.jl Artifacts.toml
- [x] confirm that buildkite results are unchanged
